testcase.classname: sanitize utils escapeRegex escapes special regex chars

testcase.classname: sanitize utils escapeRegex handles normal strings
testcase.name: sanitize utils escapeRegex handles normal strings

testcase.classname: sanitize utils sanitizeSortField allows whitelisted fields
testcase.name: sanitize utils sanitizeSortField allows whitelisted fields

testcase.classname: sanitize utils sanitizeSortField falls back to default for non-whitelisted fields
testcase.name: sanitize utils sanitizeSortField falls back to default for non-whitelisted fields

testcase.classname: sanitize utils sanitizeSortField uses provided default
testcase.name: sanitize utils sanitizeSortField uses provided default

testcase.classname: sanitize utils toSafeString converts primitives to string
testcase.name: sanitize utils toSafeString converts primitives to string

testcase.classname: sanitize utils toSafeString returns undefined for objects (prevents operator injection)
testcase.name: sanitize utils toSafeString returns undefined for objects (prevents operator injection)

testcase.classname: sanitize utils sanitizeStatus allows valid status
testcase.name: sanitize utils sanitizeStatus allows valid status

testcase.classname: sanitize utils sanitizeStatus rejects invalid status
testcase.name: sanitize utils sanitizeStatus rejects invalid status

testcase.classname: Health Check GET / returns API info
